name: White Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
Note: This is for a Large (1.5 lb) loaf, adjust the number of servings to 4 for a medium loaf, and 3 for a small loaf.
1. Place all ingredients in your bread machine in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Start the regular bread cycle.
3. The machine will mix, knead, and bake the dough automatically.
4. This recipe produces a very nice (rich) white bread.
